headline: A Look At IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) is back on many investors’ screens after a sharp pullback, with the stock down about 29% over the past 3 months and roughly 24% year to date. See our latest analysis for IQVIA Holdings. The recent 90 day share price return of about a 29% decline and year to date share price return of about a 24% decline contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return of 11.57%. This suggests shorter term momentum has faded even as longer term holders remain in positive territory. If...
